ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "visiting_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visiting team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "visiting_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the visiting team */,
  "home_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the home team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Number of overtimes played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (city and state) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoffs, etc.) */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the arena's capacity that was filled */,
  "home_team_score_q1" INTEGER /* Home team score in the first quarter */,
  "home_team_score_q2" INTEGER /* Home team score in the second quarter */,
  "home_team_score_q3" INTEGER /* Home team score in the third quarter */,
  "home_team_score_q4" INTEGER /* Home team score in the fourth quarter */,
  "visiting_team_score_q1" INTEGER /* Visiting team score in the first quarter */,
  "visiting_team_score_q2" INTEGER /* Visiting team score in the second quarter */,
  "visiting_team_score_q3" INTEGER /* Visiting team score in the third quarter */,
  "visiting_team_score_q4" INTEGER /* Visiting team score in the fourth quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visiting_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("visiting_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home arena */,
  "head_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_arena_id FOREIGN KEY ("arena_id") REFERENCES arenas ("arena_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_head_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_coach_id") REFERENCES team_coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "shooting_hand" TEXT /* Shooting hand of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year the season was played */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arenas" (
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arena */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the arena is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the arena is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  "built" INTEGER /* Year the arena was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the arena was last renovated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arena_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_arenas" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arena where the game was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "arena_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach ended their role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games the player missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the official belongs to */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_officials_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the award belongs to */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  "award_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, All-Star) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team standing */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the standing belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the standing belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* Home record (e.g., 30-12) */,
  "away_record" TEXT /* Away record (e.g., 22-20) */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team during the season */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Minutes played per game */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points scored per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds averaged per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists averaged per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Steals averaged per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks averaged per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Turnovers averaged per game */,
  "fouls_per_game" REAL /* Fouls averaged per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games_played" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponent_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "opponent_points_per_game" REAL /* Opponent points per game */,
  "opponent_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Opponent field goal percentage */,
  "opponent_rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Opponent rebounds per game */,
  "opponent_assists_per_game" REAL /* Opponent assists per game */,
  "opponent_steals_per_game" REAL /* Opponent steals per game */,
  "opponent_blocks_per_game" REAL /* Opponent blocks per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pace_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pace statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace */,
  "pace_rank" INTEGER /* Pace rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strength_of_schedule" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strength of schedule statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "strength_of_schedule" REAL /* Strength of schedule */,
  "strength_of_schedule_rank" INTEGER /* Strength of schedule rank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)
